category_sources: Official Ratchet README describes improving CI/CD workflow security by pinning and unpinning upstream versions.
source_facts.description says ratchet secures CI/CD workflows with version pinning.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Ratchet.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README contains installation, usage, examples, auth, exclusion, and terminology documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sethvargo/ratchet, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official README lists supported CI systems including GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Google Cloud Build, Drone, and Tekton.
source_facts.description identifies CI/CD workflow security and version pinning.
